title: De Quervain symptoms
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports pain, swelling, bruising, restricted movement, weight-bearing difficulty, instability, loss of function, mechanism, timing, force, direction, pop or snap, aggravating conditions, and previous episodes.
assessment.rationale: Supports entered pain, swelling, weakness, mechanism and relevant history for de Quervain symptoms; no decision is generated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Muscle Sprains & Strains – 47
source.population: People with muscle sprains or strains suitable for virtual assessment.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for sprain- or strain-compatible injury documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for broad foot, hand, sports, fracture, operative, or diagnosis-specific workflows.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports pain, swelling, bruising, restricted movement, weight-bearing difficulty, instability, loss of function, mechanism, timing, force, direction, pop or snap, aggravating conditions, and previous episodes.

assessment.text: Identifies severe pain or swelling, discoloration, weakness, movement loss, numbness, coldness, deformity, persistent symptoms, fracture or dislocation concern, and clinician-selected radiography, ultrasound, or MRI.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-assessed red flags, differential and investigation context for de Quervain symptoms; no decision is generated.
